104 
REV_CNTR_NDC_QTY 
LABEL: 
Revenue Center National Drug Code (NDC) Quantity 
DESCRIPTION: The quantity dispensed for the drug reflected on the revenue center line item. 
SHORT NAME: REV_CNTR_NDC_QTY 
LONG NAME: REV_CNTR_NDC_QTY 
TYPE: 
NUM

10 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 
FILE(S):

OP revenue
